content: Create src/engine/aiContractContext.js - build contract context for AI
Create src/engine/deterministicValidator.js - validate AI output against contract
Create src/engine/scenarioAdapter.js - adapt AI output to existing Scenario model
Create src/engine/aiTestDesigner.js - production AI test designer from aiTester.js
Modify scenarioGenerator.js - implement AI-first with deterministic fallback
Update ScenariosPanel.tsx - remove useAi=false hardcoded (optional toggle)
Create test-ai-regression.js - verify 5 control tests still work
Create test-fallback.js - verify deterministic fallback works
Run all regression tests and verify execution compatibility
